mapper.select: SELECT title, original_file_name, extracted_region_text FROM tourism_source.contest_award_photos WHERE id = CAST(#{photoId} AS uuid)
SELECT normalized_alias, sido_code, gugun_code FROM tourism_source.region_aliases WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY length(normalized_alias) DESC, normalized_alias ASC
SELECT no, title FROM tourism_source.attractions WHERE title IS NOT NULL ORDER BY length(title) DESC, no ASC
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tourism_source.contest_award_photo_matches WHERE photo_id = CAST(#{photoId} AS uuid) AND match_status = 'SELECTED' AND is_selected = true )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tourism_source.contest_award_photo_matches WHERE photo_id = CAST(#{photoId} AS uuid) AND is_selected = false AND match_method IN ('FILE_NAME_REGION', 'TITLE_TEXT', 'IMPORT_METADATA')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tourism_source.contest_award_photo_matches ( id, photo_id, attraction_no, sido_code, gugun_code, match_scope, match_status, match_method, confidence, is_selected, rationale ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{photoId} AS uuid), #{attractionNo}, #{sidoCode}, #{gugunCode}, #{matchScope}, #{matchStatus}, #{matchMethod}, #{confidence}, #{selected}, #{rationale} )
